button.name: action_client_confirm
button.invisible: (project_type == 'internal' and state not in 'new') or not requirement_status_requester_id

button.name: action_done
button.invisible: (project_type == 'internal' and state not in 'pm_confirmed') or not requirement_status_requester_id

button.name: action_client_confirm
button.invisible: (project_type == 'internal' and state not in 'new') or not requirement_status_requester_id

button.name: action_set_development
button.invisible: (project_type == 'internal' and state == 'new' and requirement_status_requester_id) or state not in 'client_confirmed'

button.name: action_set_development
button.invisible: (project_type == 'external' or state not in 'new') or requirement_status_requester_id

button.name: action_done
button.invisible: (project_type == 'internal' and state not in 'pm_confirmed') or not requirement_status_requester_id

field.name: help
field.p: Select a project & click create button to create new requirement.

field.name: help
field.p: Click create button to create new requirement.

field.name: help
field.p: Click create button to create new requirement module.

record.field: View all requirements in pivot to use it for report.
View all requirements in pivot to use it for report.

field.name: help
field.p: Click create button to create new developers.

field.name: help
field.p: Click create button to create new Stages.

field.name: help
field.p: Click create button to create new Stages Status.
